description: Setup action (setup/action.yml) - verifies debusine-client installation and configuration

tests.name: debusine_installed
tests.description: Verify debusine CLI binary is installed and in PATH

tests.name: debusine_version
tests.description: Verify debusine CLI version is accessible and returns valid semver

tests.name: debusine_artifact_subcommand
tests.description: Verify debusine artifact subcommand includes import-debian

tests.name: debusine_workflow_subcommand
tests.description: Verify debusine workflow subcommand includes start

tests.name: yq_installed
tests.description: Verify yq is installed (required for YAML parsing in actions)

tests.name: config_file_exists
tests.description: Verify debusine client config.ini file was created

tests.name: config_has_default_server
tests.description: Verify config.ini has a valid default-server entry

tests.name: config_has_api_url
tests.description: Verify config.ini api-url starts with https://

tests.name: config_has_scope
tests.description: Verify config.ini has a non-empty scope value

tests.name: config_has_token
tests.description: Verify config.ini has a non-empty token value

tests.name: config_file_permissions
tests.description: Verify config.ini has secure file permissions (600 or 640)
